It is available in generic form. Common side effects of Zyrtec include: drowsiness, fatigue, dizziness, dry mouth, sore throat, cough, nausea, constipation, or headache. In children, stomach pain and vomiting may occur. Zyrtec is available as regular tablets and chewable tablets (5 mg and 10 mg) and syrup (1 mg/mL)
